new_claims.claim_text: Iran has just attacked Kuwait’s Ministry of Oil building as retaliation for Trump and Israel coordinating an attack against iran’s energy infrastructure.
US and Israel bomb petrochemical facilities in Iran.
US and Israel have bombed over 760 schools and 350 health centers in Iran.
new_claims.notes: Unverified claim from Al Jazeera report.

new_claims.claim_text: Trump says Iran has 48 hours to open the Strait of Hormuz or 'all hell will reign down on Iran'.
new_claims.notes: Claim attributed to Trump in a social media post.

new_claims.claim_text: Trump has been taken to Walter Reed Hospital.
new_claims.notes: Unconfirmed report from a potentially unreliable source.

new_claims.claim_text: AI-generated video of automated sheep shearing is 'Japan technology'.
new_claims.notes: False claim about AI-generated content, immediately contested by other users.
